response.body:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: User Service API
  description: Discovered API specification for user-service generated by Traceable
  version: 1.0.0
servers:
  - url: https://api.example.com
paths:
  /api/v1/users:
    get:
      operationId: getUsers
      summary: Get Users
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Successfully retrieved users
  /api/v1/users/{id}:
    get:
      operationId: getUser
      summary: Get User
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
